data.name: Two Hot Chicks: an Erotica Porn Space Orgy!
data.detailed_description:
Two Hot Chicks is a puzzle game, you only need to swap the bricks to restore the pictures. The game support cheating mode and browsing pictures with one hand so that you can unlock all pictures in just one minute. There is no time or star limit in the game, you are supposed to enjoy the relaxing experience. This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Nudity or Sexual Content, General Mature Content

- Nudity or sexual content

- Not suitable for watching at work

- Not suitable for all ages

- All characters in the game are over 18 years old

Two Hot Chicks is a classic puzzle game. These puzzles will surely prove a tricky test for your brain. The beauty and elegance of the puzzles will surely make you fall in love with them. So just lean back, relax, and refresh your mind with this huge collection of puzzles. This slide puzzle game will improve your thinking skills, speed, and hand-eye coordination. You have to slide the tiles to reassemble a picture, by clicking the block you want to move.

Two Hot Chicks includes a total of 35 Sliding Puzzles.

Slide the block to fill in the blank and eliminate it.

英文*

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window XP, Windows 8, 10
  • 處理器: Pentium 4 2.8 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 7600 GT 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 900 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window XP, Windows 8, 10
  • 處理器: Pentium 4 3.4 GHz
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 9800 GT 1GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice:
9Lust Puzzles
This game is owned by Oolah Joy
